fluff.en: Hatred is a powerful motivator. Those who cross Renegade Space Marines rarely live long enough to regret their actions.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit in your army that has just been selected to shoot.

when.en: Your Shooting phase

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Without traditional methods of resupply and rearmament, Renegades must plunder or barter for their ammunition. Whether seized from the holds of captive vessels or acquired from daemonic arms dealers or xenos black marketeers, these munitions are horrifically effective.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Terror troops such as these inflict agonies upon their victims with malicious relish, targeting the weakened and wounded without pity.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: These predatory warriors sense weakness as the hydrashark smells blood, sating their bloodlust upon the fearful and wounded.

target.en: One **DAMNED** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: Within the massed ranks of a heretic cult, only a few are marked for greatness.

target.en: One **DAMNED** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds (in addition to any suffered for failing the resulting Leadership test), and until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.

fluff.en: Those in thrall to the Dark Gods will gladly sacrifice their lives to draw the eye of their darkling patrons.

target.en: One **DAMNED** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.

fluff.en: Even in the grip of frothing madness, these heretics are murderous in the extreme.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Such embittered warriors as these shrug off hails of enemy fire with arrogant disdain.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army (excluding **TZEENTCH** units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and change the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit to 6.

fluff.en: No barricade or fortification is proof against the vengeful fury of these hate-fuelled murderers.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle‑shocked and/or Below Half‑strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: When indecision and terror grip the foe, their frailties are exposed to the cruelest of lunges.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle‑shocked and/or Below Half‑strength, you can re‑roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Suitably wounded, or with the corpses of their comrades around them, the enemy’s faltering cohesion marks them as doomed.

target.en: That **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within 6" of and visible to your unit (excluding **MONSTER** and **VEHICLE** units) must take a Battle‑shock test.

fluff.en: It is not enough to slay. The foe’s allies must understand exactly what horrors await them.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

restrictions.en: You cannot target the same unit with the Empyric Dislocation and Armour of Corruption Stratagems in the same phase.

fluff.en: These warriors have not quite escaped the grip of the Warp, remaining slightly incorporeal in a way that causes enemy fire to pass harmlessly through them.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that was set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and has not declared a charge this phase.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Your unit has +2 to **charge rolls.**

fluff.en: The warp rift through which these warriors reach the battlefield has been directed toward chosen prey by a vengeful daemonic entity.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES CHAOS UNDIVIDED** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Those Heretic Astartes sworn to the service of the Dark Gods display zeal through violence.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit is selected to make a Dark Pact, you can select both abilities for that unit’s weapons to gain.

fluff.en: The blessings of Vashtorr flow through these warriors’ weapons, infusing them with power and mutating them into still‑deadlier forms.

target.en: One **SOUL FORGE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Channelling the infernal flames of the soul forges, this unit tears through its victims with blows and blasts that melt the toughest armour.

target.en: One **SOUL FORGE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER**, **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Offering up so great a sacrificial victim will surely win favour with the Arkifane, or go some way toward settling the looming debts already incurred to him.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack is allocated to your unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: These implacable soldiers weather the enemy’s fury before striking back in kind, to devastating effect.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE** unit from your army (excluding **DAEMON** units).

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, your unit has the **DAEMON** keyword.

fluff.en: Those steeped in techno-sorcery may trammel daemonic entities within mechanical constructs.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that has just been selected to shoot or fight.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.

fluff.en: Centuries of combined combat experience enable these Renegade killers to eliminate any target, bringing down resilient foes by targeting weak points or reducing hordes of enemy infantry to bloody mist with rapid volleys.

target.en: That **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army destroys a **CHARACTER** unit.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit must take a Battle-shock test.

fluff.en: The violent and bloody slaughter of the enemy’s leadership hurls their followers into object panic.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units) that is within Engagement Range of your focus of hatred.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.

fluff.en: Fearful of countenance, these ancient warriors are redolent with warp power and radiate a horrifying aura of might.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER** model in that unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just after a **HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED**, **DAEMON** AND **EPIC HERO** units) destroys an enemy unit.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Move, Toughness and Wounds characteristics of that Character model, and add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of that **CHARACTER** models melee weapons.

fluff.en: The eyes of the Dark Gods fall upon those who slaughter in their name.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, if your unit is a **TZEENTCH** unit below its Starting Strength, one destroyed model (excluding **CHARACTER** models) is returned to your unit with its full wounds remaining.

fluff.en: Those who offer praise to the God of Change may gain the benefits of his mutagenic powers.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units).

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: One model in your unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. If your unit has the **SOUL FORGE** keyword, one model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

fluff.en: Metal and muscle, wire and sinew flow together, reknitting battle damage with sparking clots of repulsive mutant growth.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER** unit from your army (excluding **Damned** units).

when.en: Any phase, just after your focus of hatred is destroyed.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is considered to be your focus of hatred.

fluff.en: No amount of bloodshed can truly satisfy this bitter champion’s desire for vengeance.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: At Huron’s order, mortals and transhuman Renegades alike throw themselves into the heart of the battle.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6".

fluff.en: Huron and his spies are always watching and judging. Those that strive hardest to reach and destroy the Tyrant’s foes may earn a greater share of the plunder.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) from your army that is within 6" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: As the fighting continues, these warriors slip away, moving to outflank and surround the embattled foe.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.

when.en: End of the Fight phase.

effect.en: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" or up to 12" if it is a **MOUNTED** unit. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move. It cannot embark within a **TRANSPORT** at the end of this move if it disembarked from a **TRANSPORT** this turn.

fluff.en: Mobility is the key to victory. These Heretic Astartes raiders outmanoeuvre outflank the foe in order to achieve victory.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If you select one or more units within range of an objective marker as a target of that charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

fluff.en: The prospect of riches spurs these renegade warriors forwards. Woe betide any in their path.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

fluff.en: These warriors possess endless endurance and are capable of weathering untold hardships in order to destroy their foes.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).

fluff.en: Veterans of countless grinding sieges, these Heretic Astartes repel and pin down wave after wave of foes with rapid boltgun fire and accurate artillery.

target.en: That **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Some Heretic Astartes are masters of deceit, often feigning retreat only to open fire from close range.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: These warriors stalk their assigned target with dogged determination, reacting to their every move.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your unit.

fluff.en: Employing fell techno-sorcery, the Heretic Astartes disrupt enemy navigational cogitators and scramble teleporter beacons.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE** unit from your army (excluding **TITANIC** units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack that destroys an enemy model, roll one D6: on a 5+, your unit regains 1 lost wound after all of its attacks have been resolved (to a maximum of 6 wounds).

fluff.en: With each soul harvested the bound daemon comes closer to settling its contract and earning freedom.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE** or **VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE** unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.

fluff.en: The tortured machine spirits of Heretic Astartes vehicles are driven forward by their anguish.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE** or **VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6", but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.

fluff.en: Corrupted Heretic Astartes vehicles pursue their prey with an animalistic determination.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE** or **VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) is selected to Fall Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) that is within Engagement Range of your unit Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

fluff.en: The daemonic entities at the heart of possessed vehicles hunger for the life force of their enemies.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Freed from the Emperor’s yoke, these warriors are motivated only by bitter hatred, channelling their ire into every brutal strike: even their final one.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Movement phase

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Renegades do not relinquish their prizes easily.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) from your army that was hit by one or more of those attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

fluff.en: Reacting to incoming fire, traitorous infantry adjust their battle plan without breaking stride, moving to take cover or closing in upon their assailants with vengeance in mind.

target.en: That **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: These warriors strike in screaming waves, each charge as brutal as the last.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES JUMP PACK** unit from your army that is in Reserves.

when.en: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.

effect.en: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. Then select one enemy **INFANTRY** or **MOUNTED** unit within 9" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle‐shock test.

fluff.en: Jump pack borne warriors descend from the skies, terrifying screams emanating from their vax-grllles as they plummet towards their prey.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit that Fell Back this turn and is within 6" of your unit. Your unit can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase. When doing so, you can only select that enemy unit as the target of that charge (and only if it is an eligible target). Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

fluff.en: The Heretic Astartes allow none to flee the battle, pursuing their broken foes with relentless savagery.

target.en: One **DAMNED** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.

fluff.en: The zealous followers of the Dark Gods are devoted to the last. As death comes they strike a desperate final blow in hope of reward.

target.en: One **DAMNED** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Consumed by a desire to spill blood, these fanatical heretics hurl themselves towards the foe.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks, and one friendly **DAMNED** unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, while your **DAMNED** unit is on the battlefield, each time your opponent would make a Wound roll for an attack that targets your **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit, if your **DAMNED** unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no roll is made; instead, your **DAMNED** unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: Disciples of the Chaos Gods think nothing of sacrificing their lesser thralls to protect those of greater worth.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit or **HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units).

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and bolt pistols, boltguns and combi-bolters equipped by models in your unit have the **[DEVASTATING WOUNDS]** ability while your unit has not already inflicted 6 wounds this turn using that ability.

fluff.en: The Warmaster’s Black Crusade grinds ever onwards without restraint or remorse.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army (excluding **DAMNED** units) that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Thousands of years of ceaseless conflict have forged these warriors into skilled and merciless killers.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Pairing unholy power with blistering speed, the full horror of these warriors’ strength is brought crashing into their foes.

target.en: That **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: These warriors strike in screaming waves, each charge as brutal as the last.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that arrived from Reserves this turn.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTER** and **VEHICLE** units) within 12" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

fluff.en: Accompanied by a burst of sensory torment, a sudden deployment can shatter the prey’s discipline.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR**, **OBLITERATORS** or **MUTILATORS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Momentary flares of empyric energy wreathe this unit, causing them to stutter through time and space more swiftly.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR**, **OBLITERATORS** or **MUTILATORS** unit from your army, within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Immaterial energies still cling to these warriors like tattered shrouds, leaving sites of significance tainted by their touch and haunted by insubstantial spectres.

target.en: Up to two **HERETIC ASTARTES** units from your army that were set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and have not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

fluff.en: These warriors have drilled relentlessly in the art of laying down murderous fire against dug‑in foes the moment they teleport into battle.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a **KHORNE** unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: The Blood God’s thirst can never be slaked.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a **SLAANESH** unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

fluff.en: As these warriors traverse the battlefield, an unnatural symphony of hypnotic music accompanies their every move, stupefying their enemies.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability. In addition, if your unit is a **NURGLE** unit, it can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

fluff.en: A roiling storm of warp energy obscures the Heretic Astartes, leaving their foes shooting at indistinct shadows.

target.en: That **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **HERETIC ASTARTES** unit from your army Advances.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the **SOUL FORGE** keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.

fluff.en: Warp‑tainted motive force and empyric plasma flows through engine and living entity alike, driving them on even as it scours them from within.

target.en: One **SOUL FORGE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: Responding swiftly to incoming fire, the bound entity within this daemon engine raises arcane wards to soak up the foe’s fury.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Bile’s experimental ministrations have left these warriors as freakish monsters. Cursed with clusters of compound eyes, distended, fang‑stuffed jaws or myriad other grotesqueries, they are hideous to behold.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a **DAMNED** unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Feeling the expectant gaze of Bile’s greatest creations from across the battlefield, transhuman and mortal warriors strive slavishly to impress.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit (excluding **DAMNED** units) from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: One destroyed model (excluding **CHARACTER** models) is returned to your unit. If your unit is a **BATTLELINE** unit, D3 destroyed models (excluding **CHARACTER** models) are returned to your unit instead.

fluff.en: Not even death can lay the most vile of Bile’s creations low.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

fluff.en: Arrays of subdermal vials inject autostimulants and biocatalysts into the warriors’ enhanced muscles, invigorating them for incredible feats of exertion.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR**, **OBLITERATORS** or **MUTILATORS** unit from your army  that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

restrictions.en: You cannot target the same unit with the Armour of Corruption and Empyric Dislocation Stratagems in the same phase.

fluff.en: Drawn to the largest and toughest warriors by their inherent sense of might and superiority, overspilling warp energies make their conceit a resilient reality.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets a **CHARACTER** unit, you can re‑roll the Wound roll. After your unit has fought, if one or more enemy **CHARACTER** models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one enemy unit within 6" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. If the enemy **WARLORD** was destroyed as a result of those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle‑shock test instead.

fluff.en: The Clonefather’s agents are always searching for new test subjects. They strive to harvest the bodies of great leaders and champions, dragging them from battle and leaving the remaining foes utterly demoralised.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY** unit (excluding **DAMNED** units) from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then select one augmentation (see Experimental Augmentations). Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the selected augmentation in addition to any other augmentations they have.

fluff.en: Fabius Bile’s experiments are notoriously unstable. In the heat of battle, new mutations may burst forth in explosions of gristle and oozing gore, many of which are as lethal to the subject as they are to the enemy.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES TRANSPORT** or **HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: The engines of this vehicle or construct crackle with the row energies of the immaterium, propelling it forward at incredible speed.

target.en: One **HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER** unit from your army that was within 18" of that enemy model when it was destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy model with the Deadly Demise ability (excluding **TITANIC** models) is destroyed.

effect.en: Your opponent does not roll to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by their model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted (if that ability inflicts a random number of mortal wounds, your opponent rolls to determine that number as normal).

fluff.en: These warriors employ expert saboteurs who utilise melta charges and improvised explosives to sow destruction.

target.en: That <k>Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>Infanterie</k> de l’<k>Hereticus Astartes</k> amie avec le mot-clé <k>Vol</k>.
target.ja: その<k>異端戦闘者・インファントリー・飛行</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>混沌星际战士步兵飞行</k>单位。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly unit that made a charge move this turn is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete fliegende Häretiker-Astartes-Infanterie-Einheit, die in diesem Zug eine Angriffsbewegung ausgeführt hat, zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Volar Infantería Astartes Herejes amiga que ha hecho algún movimiento de carga en este turno se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité d’Infanterie de l’Hereticus Astartes amie avec le mot-clé Vol qui a fait un mouvement de charge à ce tour est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, dopo che un’unità di Fanteria degli Astartes Eretici con Volare amica che ha effettuato un movimento di carica in questo turno viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、このターン中に突撃移動を行った味方異端戦闘者・インファントリー・飛行・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 이번 턴에 돌격 이동을 수행한 아군 이단 아스타르테스 보병 비행 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个在该回合中进行过冲锋移动的己方阿斯塔特叛军步兵飞行单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have <k>[Lance]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Lanza]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont <k>[Lance]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno <k>[Lancia]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの白兵攻撃は<k>［ランス］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有<k>[骑枪]</k>。

fluff.en: With a last-second blast of speed from their jump packs, the Chaos Space Marines slam into their enemies blades-first.
fluff.de: Mit in letzter Sekunde gebremsten Schubtriebwerken ihrer Sprungmodule donnern diese Chaos Space Marines mit ihren Klingen voran in den Feind.
fluff.es: Con un último impulso de sus mochilas de salto, los Marines Espaciales del Caos se lanzan contra sus enemigos con las espadas en ristre.
fluff.fr: Dans une poussée de leurs réacteurs dorsaux à la dernière seconde, les Space Marines du Chaos percutent l'ennemi lames en avant.
fluff.it: Con un’accelerata improvvisa dei reattori dorsali, gli Space Marines del Caos si avventano sui nemici con le lame sguainate.
fluff.ja: 最後の瞬間にジャンプパックを爆発的に噴射させ、ケイオス・スペースマリーンは刃を突き出したまま敵陣へ激突する。
fluff.ko: 충돌 직전 점프팩을 분사하여 얻은 추진력으로 카오스 스페이스 마린은 검 끝을 앞세워 적에게 들이박는다.
fluff.zh: 在最后一刻使用跳跃背包推进，混沌星际战士能够直接刺入敌阵。

target.en: That <k>Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité d’<k>Infanterie</k> de l’<k>Hereticus Astartes</k> qui a le mot-clé <k>Vol</k>.
target.ja: その<k>異端戦闘者・インファントリー・飛行</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>混沌星际战士步兵飞行</k>单位。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Infantry Fly unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete fliegende Häretiker-Astartes-Infanterie-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugs­bewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad Volar Infantería Astartes Herejes amiga se elige para realizar un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité d’Infanterie de l’Hereticus Astartes amie qui a le mot-clé Vol est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di Fanteria degli Astartes Eretici con Volare amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方異端戦闘者・インファントリー・飛行・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 이단 아스타르테스 보병 비행 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 您的移动阶段中，在一个己方阿斯塔特叛军步兵飞行单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to declare a charge.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, einen Angriff anzusagen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no le impide a tu unidad ser apta para declarar cargas.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour déclarer une charge.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a dichiarare una carica.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットは射撃を宣言可能である。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 그 아군 유닛은 돌격 선언이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止您的单位宣布冲锋。

fluff.en: Surging in and out of the enemy lines on wings of dark fire, these predatory killers wreak bloody havoc.
fluff.de: Diese raubvogelartigen Killer springen mitten unter ihre Feinde und verschwinden wieder auf Schwingen dunkler Flammen, wobei sie blutiges Durcheinander hinterlassen.
fluff.es: Entrando y saliendo de las líneas enemigas con alas de fuego oscuro, estos asesinos depredadores siembran el caos.
fluff.fr: Surgissant dans et hors des lignes adverses sur des ailes de feu noir, ces prédateurs répandent un carnage sanglant.
fluff.it: Questi assassini seminano scompiglio muovendosi dentro e fuori dalle linee nemiche su ali di fuoco nero.
fluff.ja: この獰猛なる捕食者たちは、暗き炎の翼をまとい、敵の戦列を縫うように突入と離脱を繰り返す。そのたびに、凄惨なまでの流血をもたらしてゆくのだ。
fluff.ko: 이 위험천만한 살육자들은 검은 불꽃을 뿜는 날개를 펼쳐 적의 전열을 들락날락하며 피 튀기는 파괴를 선사한다.
fluff.zh: 披着黑暗火焰的翅膀在敌阵中来回突袭，这些掠食杀手展开了血腥的杀戮。

target.en: That <k>Warp Talons</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ワープタロン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly <k>Warp Talons</k> unit ends a move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Warpkrallen</k>-Einheit eine Bewegung beendet
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento, cuando una unidad <k>Espolones de la Disformidad</k> amiga termina un movimiento.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de <k>Serres du Warp</k> amie finit un mouvement.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di <k>Artigli del Warp</k> amica termina un movimento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方<k>ワープタロン</k>・ユニットが移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 <k>워프 탈론</k> 유닛이 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段中，当一个己方<k>次元爪</k>单位结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit (excluding Monster/Vehicle units) within 9" of your unit. That enemy unit makes a battle-shock roll, with -1 to that battle-shock roll.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit (ausgenommen Monster-/Fahrzeug-Einheiten) innerhalb von 9"; jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Erschütterungswurf mit -1 aus.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga (salvo Monstruo/Vehículo) visible para tu unidad y a 9" o menos de ella. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de acobardamiento con -1 a la tirada.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible (unités de Monstre/Véhicule exclues) à 9" ou moins de votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement, avec -1 à ce jet.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile (escluse le unità Mostro/Veicolo) entro 9" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro per i traumi, con -1 a quel tiro per i traumi.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの9mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニット（モンスター/ビークル・ユニットを除く）を1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。このユニット内の兵10体につき、その戦闘ショックロールはそれぞれ-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 9" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어오는 적 유닛(괴수/기체 유닛 제외)을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 전투충격 굴림을 수행합니다. 그 전투충격 굴림 값에는 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位 9" 内且可见的敌方单位。（凶兽/载具单位除外）。那个敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰，并且那次战斗震慑掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: So hideous and otherworldly have many Warp Talons been rendered by the energies of the Warp, that merely to look upon their approach is enough to scare the enemy out of their minds.
fluff.de: Viele Warpkrallen sind durch die Energien des Warp so abscheulich und fremdartig geworden, dass schon der Anblick ihres Nahens reicht, um den Feind vor Angst wahnsinnig werden zu lassen.
fluff.es: En tan horribles y sobrenaturales seres han sido convertidos muchos Espolones de la Disformidad, que el simple hecho de verlos acercarse basta para aterrorizar al enemigo.
fluff.fr: Les Serres du Warp sont si hideuses que les voir approcher suffit à transir l'ennemi de peur.
fluff.it: Le energie del Warp hanno reso così orribili e sovrannaturali questi Artigli del Warp, che anche solo assistere al loro arrivo può far impazzire i nemici per la paura.
fluff.ja: 〈歪み〉の奔流に捻じ曲げられたワープタロンの姿はあまりに禍々しく、迫り来るその姿を見るだけで、敵の理性は恐怖で打ち砕かれる。
fluff.ko: 워프 에너지로 인해 대다수의 워프 탈론은 너무도 기괴하고 낯설게 변모했다. 저들이 다가오는 모습만 봐도 적은 혼비백산이 된다.
fluff.zh: 许多次元爪都被亚空间的能量扭曲成了丑恶异常的形态，单纯只是看见他们接近就足以让敌人感到恐惧。

target.en: That <k>Havocs/Obliterators</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハヴォック/オブリタレイター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Havocs/Obliterators unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Havoc-/Kyborg-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Aniquiladores/Arrasadores amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Havocs/Obliterators amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Falcidiatori/Obliteratori amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方ハヴォック/オブリタレイター・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 절멸자/말살자 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方浩劫/泯灭者单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en:
When your unit uses the Dark Pacts ability, your unit’s ranged attacks have:
  • [Lethal Hits].
  • [Sustained Hits 1].
effect.de:
Wenn deine Einheit die Fähigkeit Dunkle Pakte einsetzt, haben die Fernkampfattacken deiner Einheit:
  • [Tödliche Treffer].
  • [Trefferhagel 1].
effect.es:
Cuando tu unidad use la habilidad Pactos Oscuros, los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen:
  • [Impactos letales].
  • [Golpes sostenidos 1].
effect.fr:
Quand votre unité utilise l’aptitude Sombres Pactes, ses attaques de tir ont :
  • [Touches Fatales].
  • [Touches Soutenues 1].
effect.it:
Quando la tua unità usa l’abilità Patti Oscuri, i suoi attacchi da tiro hanno:
  • [Colpi Letali].
  • [Scarica di Colpi 1].
effect.ja:
自軍ユニットが『暗黒の盟約』アビリティを使用した時、その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は以下を持つ：
  • ［会心ヒット］。
  • ［連続命中1］。
effect.ko:
이 유닛이 암흑 서약 능력을 사용할 때, 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 다음을 부여합니다.
  • [살상타]
  • [연타 1]
effect.zh:
在您的单位使用黑暗契约技能时，该单位的远程攻击拥有：
  • [致命一击]。
  • [连击 1]。

fluff.en: As the murderous rain of projectiles redoubles and the fires of ruin burn higher, so the favour of the Dark Gods falls upon the architects of this devastation.
fluff.de: Wenn der tödliche Geschosshagel sich intensiviert und die Flammen der Verderbnis höher schlagen, kommt den Schöpfern solcher Verheerung auch die Gunst der Dunklen Götter zugute.
fluff.es: A medida que la lluvia asesina de proyectiles se redobla y las llamas de la ruina arden con más fuerza, el favor de los Dioses Oscuros recae sobre los artífices de esta devastación.
fluff.fr: Alors que redouble la pluie de projectiles et que les feux de la ruine s’intensifient, la faveur des Dieux Sombres récompense les architectes de cette dévastation.
fluff.it: Quando la micidiale pioggia di proiettili aumenta d’intensità e le fiamme della rovina bruciano più alte, il favore degli Dei Oscuri ricopre i fautori della devastazione.
fluff.ja: 砲弾が殺戮の雨と化し、その勢いが強まるにつれ、破滅の炎がより高く燃え上がるにつれ、その破壊を作り上げた者たちに暗黒神の寵愛が降り注ぐ。
fluff.ko: 죽음의 비가 빗발치고 잔해 속에서 피어오르는 불길이 더욱더 거세질수록, 이러한 파멸을 몰고 온 이들에게 암흑신의 은총이 닿는다.
fluff.zh: 随着杀戮弹雨和毁灭火焰的进一步增强，黑暗诸神对这些破坏使者的祝福也随之增加。

target.en: That <k>Havocs</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハヴォック</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of a friendly unengaged Havocs unit.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um eine befreundete Havoc-Einheit beendet, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termine un movimiento a 8" o menos de una unidad Aniquiladores amiga no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8” ou moins d’une unité de Havocs amie non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da un’unità di Falcidiatori non ingaggiata amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方の非接敵状態であるハヴォック・ユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 절멸자 유닛의 8" 내에서 적 유닛이 이동을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在一个不处于交战状态的己方浩劫单位的 8" 内结束一次移动时。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: Even as the foe attempts to escape the rain of ruination, or to close with the foes so cruelly winnowing their ranks, so these Havocs move to establish new sight lines and draw their victims into an inescapable crossfire.
fluff.de: Noch während der Feind versucht, dem Hagel der Vernichtung zu entgehen oder sich den Feinden zu nähern, die so grausam seine Reihen ausdünnen, setzen sich diese Havocs in Bewegung, um neue Feuerlinien zu etablieren und ihre Opfer in gefährliches Kreuzfeuer zu locken.
fluff.es: Cuando el enemigo intenta escapar de la lluvia de destrucción, o acercarse a los oponentes que tan cruelmente reducen sus filas, los Aniquiladores se mueven para establecer nuevas líneas de visión y atraer a sus víctimas a un fuego cruzado.
fluff.fr: Alors même que l’ennemi tente de se soustraire à la pluie de ruine, ou de se rapprocher de l’adversaire qui décime si cruellement ses rangs, ces Havocs se déplacent pour établir de nouvelles lignes de tir et attirer l’ennemi dans un tir croisé fatal.
fluff.it: Mentre il nemico tenta di sfuggire alla devastazione o di avvicinarsi agli aguzzini che ne sfoltiscono i ranghi, questi Falcidiatori si muovono per stabilire nuove linee di tiro e attirare le vittime in un micidiale fuoco incrociato.
fluff.ja: 敵が破滅の雨から逃れようと試みたり、隊列を残虐に刈り取っていく敵に肉薄しようとしても、このハヴォックたちは新たな射線を構築し、逃れられぬ十字砲火の中に犠牲者を引きずり込む。
fluff.ko: 적이 화망을 벗어나려 안간힘을 쓰거나 자신들을 도륙하는 상대와 거리를 좁히고자 기를 써본들, 절멸자는 그때마다 새로이 사격선을 형성해 희생양을 십자포화 속에 가둬둔다.
fluff.zh: 正当敌军试图逃离那倾泻而下的毁灭之雨，或是试图逼近那些正残酷收割着他们同袍的仇敌之时，这些浩劫却已迅速转移阵地，建立起新的射界，将猎物诱入那无处可逃的交叉火力之中。

target.en: That <k>Havocs/Obliterators</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ハヴォック/オブリタレイター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Havocs/Obliterators</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Havoc</k>-<k>/Kyborg</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Aniquiladores/Arrasadores</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Havocs/Obliterators</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità di <k>Falcidiatori/Obliteratori</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>ハヴォック/オブリタレイター</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>절멸자/말살자</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>浩劫/泯灭者</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité et dont la F est supérieur à son E ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 当对您的单位进行的攻击的 S 大于该单位的 T 时，那次攻击的致伤掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: Gripped by a maniacal need to annihilate their hated enemies, these killers will not easily succumb to the clutches of death.
fluff.de: Diese mordlüsternen Irren sind so davon besessen, ihre verhassten Feinde auszurotten, dass sie sich nicht so ohne Weiteres dem Tod hingeben.
fluff.es: Presos de una necesidad frenética de aniquilar a sus odiados enemigos, estos asesinos no sucumben fácilmente a las garras de la muerte.
fluff.fr: Étreints par le besoin hystérique d’annihiler leurs ennemis jurés, ces tueurs ne succomberont pas aisément.
fluff.it: Pervasi da un bisogno maniacale di annientare gli odiati nemici, questi assassini non cedono facilmente alla morte.
fluff.ja: この殺戮者たちは仇敵を根絶するという狂気の衝動に囚われており、簡単に死に屈することはない。
fluff.ko: 적을 기어코 절멸하고자 하는 광기 어린 증오에 잠식된 살육자들은 다가오는 죽음조차 쉬이 받아들이지 않는다.
fluff.zh: 在想要消灭敌人的痴狂冲动下，这些屠夫不会轻易死去。

target.en: One friendly <k>Heretic Astartes Psyker</k> unit.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Psyker</k> de l’<k>Hereticus Astartes</k> amie.
target.ja: 味方<k>異端戦闘者・サイカー</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>阿斯塔特叛军灵能者</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en:
Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. Roll one D6:
  • On a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
  • On a 2‑4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
  • On a 5‑6, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds.
These mortal wounds are inflicted by a psychic attack.
effect.de:
Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Wirf einen W6:
  • Bei einer 1 erleidet jene feindliche Einheit 1 tödliche Verwundung.
  • Bei 2-4 erleidet jene feindliche Einheit W3 tödliche Verwundungen.
  • Bei 5-6 erleidet jene feindliche Einheit 2W3 tödliche Verwundungen.
Jene tödlichen Verwundungen gelten als durch eine psionische Attacke verursacht.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de tu unidad. Tira 1D6:
  • Con un 1, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1 herida mortal.
  • Con 2-4, esa unidad enemiga sufre 1D3 heridas mortales.
  • Con 5-6, esa unidad enemiga sufre 2D3 heridas mortales.
Esas heridas mortales las inflige un ataque psíquico.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. Jetez un D6 :
  • Sur un résultat de 1, l’unité ennemie choisie subit 1 blessure mortelle.
  • Sur 2‑4, l’unité ennemie choisie subit D3 blessures mortelles.
  • Sur 5‑6, l’unité ennemie choisie subit 2D3 blessures mortelles.
Ces blessures mortelles sont infligées par une attaque psychique.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Tira un D6:
  • Con 1 quell’unità nemica subisce 1 ferita mortale.
  • Con 2-4 quell’unità nemica subisce D3 ferite mortali.
  • Con 5-6 quell’unità nemica subisce 2D3 ferite mortali.
Queste ferite mortali sono inflitte da un attacco psichico.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択し、D6を1個ロールする：
  • ロール結果が1の場合、その敵ユニットは1ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
  • ロール結果が2-4の場合、その敵ユニットはD3ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
  • ロール結果が5-6の場合、その敵ユニットは2D3ポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
これらの致命的ダメージはサイキック攻撃によって与えられたものとして扱われる。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. D6를 하나 굴립니다.
  • 값이 1이면, 그 적 유닛은 1 치명상을 입습니다.
  • 값이 2~4이면, 그 적 유닛은 D3 치명상을 입습니다.
  • 값이 5~6이면, 그 적 유닛은 2D3 치명상을 입습니다.
이 치명상은 사이킥 공격으로 가해집니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个位于该单位 12" 内且可见的敌方单位。掷一枚 D6:
  • 如果掷骰结果为 1，那个敌方单位受到 1 处致命伤。
  • 如果掷骰结果为 2-4，那个敌方单位受到 D3 处致命伤。
  • 如果掷骰结果为 5-6，那个敌方单位受到 2D3 处致命伤。
这些致命伤由灵能攻击造成。

fluff.en: Chanting words of forbidden power, this heretic witch triggers a ghastly explosion of hypermutation within the bodies of foes, rapidly transforming them into heaving mounds of gibbering meat.
fluff.de: Dieser häretische Magier intoniert Worte verbotener Macht und löst eine scheußliche Explosion der wogenden Mutation in den Leibern seiner Feinde aus, die sich schnell in keuchende Fleischberge verwandeln.
fluff.es: Cantando palabras de poder prohibido, esta bruja hereje desencadena una espantosa explosión de hipermutación en los cuerpos de los enemigos, transformándolos en montones de carne farfullante.
fluff.fr: En chantant des mots de pouvoir interdit, ce sorcier hérétique fait exploser le corps des ennemis sous les mutations, les réduisant en tas de viande babillante.
fluff.it: Intonando parole di potere proibito, questa strega eretica innesca una terribile esplosione di ipermutazioni nei corpi dei nemici, trasformandoli rapidamente in masse ansimanti di carne.
fluff.ja: この異端の妖術師は禁忌の呪言を唱えることで、敵の体内でおぞましき超変異の炸裂を引き起こし、うごめく肉塊へと姿を急速に変化させてしまう。
fluff.ko: 금단의 힘을 읊어대는 이 이단 사술사는 적의 체내로부터 초변이를 일으켜 참혹한 폭발을 유발한다. 희생양은 급속히 육신이 뒤틀려 기괴한 소리를 내는 고깃덩이로 전락한다.
fluff.zh: 这位异端巫师吟诵着禁忌之力的咒语，在敌人的体内引爆了一场骇人的超变异狂潮，令其迅速异化为一堆堆蠕动抽搐、语无伦次的肉块。

target.en: One friendly <k>Heretic Astartes Psyker/Daemon</k> unit (excluding <k>Khorne</k> units).
target.fr: Une unité de <k>Psyker/Démon</k> de l’<k>Hereticus Astartes</k> amie (unités de <k>Khorne</k> exclues).
target.it: Un’unità di <k>Psionico/Demone</k> degli <k>Astartes Eretici</k> amica (escluse le unità di <k>Khorne</k>).
target.ja: 味方<k>異端戦闘者・サイカー/ディーモン</k>・ユニット（<k>コーン</k>・ユニットを除く）1個。
target.ko: 아군 <k>이단 아스타르테스 사이커/데몬</k> 유닛(<k>코온</k> 유닛 제외) 하나.
target.zh: 一个己方<k>阿斯塔特叛军灵能者/恶魔</k>单位（<k>恐虐</k>单位除外）。

when.en: Your Command phase.
when.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中。

effect.en: Your unit heals D3+1 wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit wird um bis zu W3+1 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
effect.fr: Votre unité soigne D3+1 points de vie.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは【負傷限界】をD3+1ポイント回復する。
effect.zh: 您的单位 治疗 D3+1 处耐伤。

fluff.en: With the unbound energies of the Warp surging through them, this infernal champion heals of their hurts as quickly as the enemy can inflict them.
fluff.de: Da die ungebundenen Kräfte des Warp durch seine Adern strömen, wird dieser teuflische Champion ebenso schnell geheilt, wie der Feind ihm Wunden zufügen kann.
fluff.es: Con las ilimitadas energías de la disformidad fluyendo a través de él, este campeón infernal cura de sus heridas tan rápido como el enemigo las inflige.
fluff.fr: Grâce à l’infinie énergie du Warp qui coule en lui, ce champion infernal guéri de ses blessures aussi rapidement que l’ennemi peut les lui infliger.
fluff.it: Grazie alle energie sconfinate del Warp che scorrono al suo interno, questo campione infernale risana le ferite più velocemente di quanto i nemici riescano a infliggerle.
fluff.ja: この魔の闘士の体内には止めどなき〈歪み〉のエネルギーが流れており、負傷を負うのと同じぐらいの早さで傷が癒されていく。
fluff.ko: 워프의 요동치는 에너지가 이 부정한 용사에게 흘러들면 적이 가한 상처도 그 즉시 회복된다.
fluff.zh: 亚空间能量流淌在这位勇士的体内，使他几乎能在敌人对其造成伤害的瞬间恢复伤势。

target.en: That <k>Heretic Astartes Psyker</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>Psyker</k> de l’<k>Hereticus Astartes</k>.
target.ja: その<k>異端戦闘者・サイカー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>阿斯塔特叛军灵能者</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Heretic Astartes Psyker unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Häretiker-­Astartes-Psioniker-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Psíquico Astartes Herejes amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Psyker de l’Hereticus Astartes amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità Psionica degli Astartes Eretici amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方異端戦闘者・サイカー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 이단 아스타르테스 사이커 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方阿斯塔特叛军灵能者单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Ignores Cover]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>。

fluff.en: Secondary cantrips blossom out like poisoned flowers from the heart of this sorcerous manifestation, raining mutating flame upon the foe in roiling clouds.
fluff.de: Wie giftige Blumen öffnen sich sekundäre Funkenstürme aus dieser hexerischen Manifestation und lassen mutierende Flammen in wogenden Wolken auf den Feind niedergehen.
fluff.es: Magias secundarias florecen como flores envenenadas desde el corazón de esta manifestación hechicera, lanzando llamas mutantes sobre el enemigo en nubes turbulentas.
fluff.fr: Des sortilèges secondaires font éclore des fleurs empoisonnées au cœur de cette manifestation empyréenne, en faisant pleuvoir un feu mutant sur l’ennemi.
fluff.it: Ulteriori incantesimi germogliano come fiori velenosi dal cuore di questa manifestazione arcana, riversando turbinanti nubi di fiamme mutagene sul nemico.
fluff.ja: この魔術の顕現体の中核からは副次的な魔術が毒の花のように乱れ咲く。そして渦巻く雲のように、敵に変異の炎を降らせる。
fluff.ko: 이 주술적 발현의 중심에서 소마법이 독을 머금은 꽃처럼 피어난다. 이윽고, 소용돌이치는 운무 속에서 적의 머리 위로 변이의 불꽃을 비처럼 쏟아붓는다.
fluff.zh: 次级巫术如同有毒鲜花一般从中心散开，向敌人倾泻变异的火焰。

description.en:
Heretic Astartes model only (excluding Khorne models).
  • This model has Psyker.
  • This model’s weapons have [Psychic].
description.de:
Nur für ein Häretiker-Astartes-Modell (ausgenommen Khorne-Modelle).
  • Dieses Modell hat Psioniker.
  • Die Waffen dieses Modells haben [Psionisch].
description.es:
Solo miniatura Astartes Herejes (salvo miniaturas Khorne).
  • Esta miniatura tiene Psíquico.
  • Las armas de esta miniatura tienen [Psíquica].
description.fr:
Figurine de l’Hereticus Astartes seulement (figurines de Khorne exclues).
  • Cette figurine a le mot-clé Psyker.
  • Les armes de cette figurine ont [Psychique].
description.it:
Solo modelli di Astartes Eretici (esclusi modelli di Khorne).
  • Questo modello ha Psionico.
  • Le armi di questo modello hanno [Psichica].
description.ja:
異端戦闘者・兵のみ（コーン・兵を除く）。
  • このユニットはサイカーを持つ。
  • この兵の武器は［サイキック］を持つ。
description.ko:
이단 아스타르테스 모델(코온 모델 제외) 전용.
  • 이 모델에 사이커를 부여합니다.
  • 이 모델의 무기에 [사이킥]을 부여합니다.
description.zh:
仅限阿斯塔特叛军模型（恐虐模型除外）。
  • 该模型拥有灵能者关键词。
  • 该模型的武器拥有[灵能]。

description.en:
Warpsmith model only.
  • When this unit uses its Dark Pacts ability, this unit can re‑roll Leadership rolls.
  • In your Shooting phase, when this unit has shot, if this unit used its Dark Pacts ability and if those attacks destroyed an enemy model, this unit heals 3 wounds.
description.de:
Nur für ein Warpschmied-Modell.
  • Wenn diese Einheit ihre Fähigkeit Dunkle Pakte einsetzt, können Moralwertwürfe für sie wiederholt werden.
  • Nachdem diese Einheit in deiner Fernkampfphase geschossen hat, wenn sie ihre Fähigkeit Dunkle Pakte eingesetzt hat und durch jene Attacken mindestens ein feindliches Modell zerstört wurde, wird diese Einheit um 3 Lebenspunkte geheilt.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Herrero Disforme.
  • Cuando esta unidad use su habilidad Pactos oscuros, esta unidad puede repetir las tiradas de Liderazgo.
  • En tu fase de disparo, cuando esta unidad haya disparado, si esta unidad usó su habilidad Pactos Oscuros, y si esos ataques eliminaron alguna miniatura enemiga, esta unidad se cura 3 heridas.
description.fr:
Figurine de Techmancien seulement.
  • Quand cette unité utilise son aptitude Sombres Pactes, elle peut relancer les jets de Commandement.
  • À votre phase de Tir, une fois que cette unité a tiré, si elle a utilisé son aptitude Sombres Pactes et si ces attaques ont détruit une figurine ennemie, cette unité soigne 3 PV.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Artefice del Warp.
  • Quando questa unità usa la sua abilità Patti Oscuri, può ripetere i tiri disciplina.
  • Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che questa unità ha tirato, se ha usato la sua abilità Patti Oscuri e quegli attacchi hanno distrutto un modello nemico, questa unità guarisce 3 ferite.
description.ja:
ワープスミス・兵のみ。
  • このユニットが『暗黒の盟約』アビリティを使用した場合、このユニットは指揮統制ロールをリロールできる。

description.it:
Solo unità Personaggio dell’Adepta Sororitas (escluse unità di Penitenti). (Una volta per turno, per unità) All’inizio di una fase puoi usare questa abilità. Se lo fai, scegli una delle abilità in basso.
  • Rito della Rivelazione: mentre questa unità tira, le unità nemiche hanno +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
  • Sermone dell’Intolleranza: i tiri per i traumi di questa unità hanno automaticamente successo.
  • Catechismo del Fervore Furibondo: questa unità ha +1" M.
  • Salmo della Giusta Punizione: gli attacchi di questa unità hanno +1 Fo.
  • Coro della Sconfessione: gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio questa unità e che hanno una Fo maggiore della R di questa unità hanno ‑1 ai tiri per ferire.

description.ja: ワープスミス・兵のみ。このユニットが射撃を宣言した時、このユニットの24mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットを1個選択する。このユニットの射撃が完了するまでの間、選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
